collectionBoundaries.approvalAuthority: human maintainers, Copilot/Codex review handling, required checks, and repository branch protection remain the approval authority
collectionBoundaries.reportOnlyReason: The report measures traceability and friction for one scoped self-dogfood flow; it does not approve, merge, waive findings, or add a policy-gate rule.

sourceArtifacts.description: Checked-in scope memo, evidence path, and observations for the self-dogfood flow.
ExecPlan v2 artifact connecting Issue intent, tasks, verification, evidence, and stop rules.
Existing report-only req2run fixture used to exercise the adoption-readiness metric surface.
Reviewer-facing traceability preview for the self-dogfood PR.
Local and GitHub verification output is produced during PR validation and linked in the completion comment.
Final completion audit is posted after PR merge because final check rollup and review completeness are not known before closeout.

time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.purpose: Measure time from Issue acceptance to first runnable verification when live timing is intentionally collected.
time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.calculationMethod: Not collected for this PR because Issue creation time predates the active measurement window; future runs should record start/end timestamps at run start.
time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.interpretation: The missing value is a friction finding: the protocol needs an explicit start timestamp before speed-like metrics can be used.
time_to_first_runnable_verification_minu.limitation: Do not infer speed, review efficiency, or adoption impact from this self-dogfood run.

evidence_coverage.purpose: Track how much of the required evidence chain is available before PR closeout.
evidence_coverage.calculationMethod: Required source artifacts marked present divided by all required source artifacts in this measurement report.
evidence_coverage.interpretation: Pre-PR evidence is mostly available; final verification output and completion audit are expected to become present during closeout.
evidence_coverage.limitation: Pre-merge coverage is intentionally incomplete because final CI/review/audit evidence is only available after PR stabilization.

missing_evidence_count.purpose: Keep missing closeout evidence visible before merge rather than implying the flow is complete early.
missing_evidence_count.calculationMethod: Count required artifacts marked present=false in this measurement fixture.
missing_evidence_count.interpretation: Two expected closeout artifacts remain until local/GitHub verification and post-merge completion audit are recorded.
missing_evidence_count.limitation: This is a lifecycle state, not a failure, unless the PR is merged without adding the audit comment.

unresolved_claim_count.purpose: Confirm that the scoped claims in this self-dogfood report have explicit dispositions.
unresolved_claim_count.calculationMethod: Count scoped report claims without evidence, limitation, deferral, or non-applicability disposition.
unresolved_claim_count.interpretation: The checked-in report scopes its claims to traceability and instrumentation readiness only.
unresolved_claim_count.limitation: This does not prove implementation correctness or absence of untracked claims outside the report.

review_rework_count.purpose: Measure actionable review-feedback clusters that require follow-up commits.
review_rework_count.calculationMethod: Collected after Copilot/Codex and maintainer review threads are handled.
review_rework_count.interpretation: Not yet collected at initial fixture creation time.
review_rework_count.limitation: The final completion comment must record review rework based on actual review threads.

deterministic_replay_pass.purpose: Record whether local schema/docs validation can replay the self-dogfood evidence package.
deterministic_replay_pass.calculationMethod: Pass when `node scripts/ci/validate-json.mjs`, docs consistency, and docs lint complete locally.
deterministic_replay_pass.interpretation: The checked-in evidence package can be validated without live external agent APIs.
deterministic_replay_pass.limitation: Local replay does not replace GitHub CI or final PR review.

manual_intervention_count.purpose: Track required human/operator actions that cannot be automated before final PR state is known.
manual_intervention_count.calculationMethod: Count explicit manual/operator actions in the flow. The final completion audit comment is one required closeout action.
manual_intervention_count.interpretation: The main governance intervention is post-merge audit recording.
manual_intervention_count.limitation: Manual intervention here is an intentional control, not necessarily product friction.

audit_discrepancy_count.purpose: Identify where completion-audit evidence cannot be truthfully claimed before final PR closeout.
audit_discrepancy_count.calculationMethod: Count audit notes where pre-merge artifacts would be misleading if described as final closeout evidence.
audit_discrepancy_count.interpretation: The flow must keep final audit wording in the post-merge Issue comment rather than the initial PR body.
audit_discrepancy_count.limitation: This count is expected for a live PR self-dogfood flow and should be re-evaluated after merge.

allowedClaims: Issue #3570 has a checked-in trace from Issue intent to scope memo, ExecPlan v2, metrics fixture, PR assurance review preview, and planned completion audit.
The self-dogfood evidence package validates locally without live external agent APIs.
forbiddenClaims: Do not claim faster review, safer code, external adoption, or agent-vendor superiority from this single self-dogfood run.
Do not claim the PR is complete until Copilot/Codex review, required checks, full check rollup, and completion audit comment are recorded.
Do not treat report-only metrics as approval, waiver, or policy-gate enforcement.
claimBoundaries.notes: This report intentionally separates pre-merge evidence from post-merge completion audit evidence.

limitations: The first-runnable-verification timing metric is not collected because the measurement start timestamp was not fixed at Issue creation time.
Completion audit evidence is unavailable until the PR reaches final review and CI state.
The flow is a docs/fixtures self-dogfood slice and does not exercise a large implementation change.
summary: Self-dogfood measurement for #3570: pre-merge evidence coverage 5/7, missing closeout evidence count 2, unresolved claim count 0, deterministic replay pass true, manual intervention count 1, audit discrepancy count 1, and time/review-rework metrics deferred until final closeout evidence exists.
